{{CargoRelic
|name=Star-Lord's Walkman
|class_id=20572
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This Walkman carries Star-Lord's longing for home. Even more precious is the unique mixtape carefully recorded by his mother.
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=17
|civ=29
|tech=15
|ss1=All Rocket Cabin production +0.5%<br>Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail HP +10<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss2=All Rocket Cabin production +1%<br>Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail HP +20<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss3=All Rocket Cabin production +1.5%<br>Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail HP +30<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss4=All Rocket Cabin production +1.5%<br>Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail HP +30<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss7=All Rocket Cabin production +1.5%<br>Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail HP +30<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000<br> (Awakened)
}}
